verdict.answer_first: A: "**Vitest.**" is the actionable answer in sentence 1; B also starts "use Vitest" but with extra framing.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder: "For a greenfield TS project with no Jest legacy, go Vitest." B adds more setup and caveats.
verdict.fabrication: B overreaches with "path aliases just run" and "HMR-style — only reruns affected tests"; A's "noticeably faster" is vague but not a new specific mechanism.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to execute because it includes "npm i -D vitest" plus config and scripts.
